tools.title: Business Profile & FAQs

tools.title: SEO & Site Optimization
tools.description: On-page SEO audit checklists, structured data markup, XML sitemap, Core Web Vitals, and keyword strategy for electrical services.

tools.description: GTM container setup, event tracking tags, conversion tracking for Google Ads and GA4, custom events, and trigger management.

tools.title: Ads & Campaigns
tools.description: Campaign structure for search, display, and local services ads. Budget allocation, bidding strategy, ad copy templates, and negative keywords.

tools.title: Analytics & Reporting
tools.description: GA4 setup, key metrics dashboard, goal configuration, custom report templates, and attribution model guidance.

tools.title: Content Composer
tools.description: Compose Google Business posts with character limits, post type selection, image sizing, CTA buttons, and live preview.
